title: Big Gift Snowglobe
description: Adds a big festive snowglobe featuring giant Christmas gifts, small loot, and one larger dungeon style gift containing Strays.
body:
This mod adds a big festive snowglobe to snowy biomes.

Inside the globe you’ll find snowmen, polar bears, and several giant Christmas gifts containing small loot rewards.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5422370f28822f70c6af28ad9dfbe658082740ef.jpeg)

The largest gift in the center functions as a small dungeon room with Stray spawners. Defeat them to earn loot hidden inside the gift.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f36ae3a3884675d501c3abdce077284707992b34.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23b3742d747a79039f73431571a27dd699a6db02.jpeg)

The snowglobe is fully decorated and can also serve as a cozy spot to build a base.

You can find the snowglobe in Snowy Plains biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks

Made by SuperWarioModTeam and Dante_Dnd
